recommendations.title: The Quake
recommendations.overview: A geologist races against time to save his estranged wife and two children when a devastating earthquake strikes Oslo, Norway.

recommendations.title: The King's Choice

recommendations.title: Fingernails
recommendations.overview: Anna and Ryan have found true love together. It's been proven by a controversial test. There's just one problem: Anna still isn't sure. Then she meets Amir.

recommendations.title: The Corpse of Anna Fritz

recommendations.title: Piper
recommendations.overview: A mother bird tries to teach her little one how to find food by herself. In the process, she encounters a traumatic experience that she must overcome in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Come Undone

recommendations.title: 22 July

recommendations.title: L'Avventura

recommendations.title: The Silence

recommendations.title: The Unthinkable
recommendations.overview: Sweden faces a mysterious attack while Alex tries to reunite with his youth love, Anna.
